decision.summary: Hold the weekly 64k dip position and skip any new BTC entry this cycle.
decision.rationale: The open weekly position `will-bitcoin-dip-to-64k-march-30-april-5` on `Yes` is still above stop-loss and far below take-profit, so it does not need management. Beecthor’s latest transcript and summaries remain macro bearish, but still allow an extra sweep toward 68.8k-69k before continuation lower; Binance at 67559.21 with recent strength keeps that risk alive. The nearest additional bearish daily market is too weakly priced, and the remaining weekly alternatives either conflict with thesis or offer poor value, so there is no clean playbook-compliant edge.
